scripts.build: pnpm -C packages/ui run build && mv packages/ui/dist packages/api/dist && go -C packages/api build
scripts.db:diagram: pnpm exec sql2dbml packages/api/db/migrations/001_initial.up.sql --postgres -o docs/db/opendrive.dbml && dbml-renderer -i docs/db/opendrive.dbml -o docs/db/opendrive.svg
scripts.format: pnpm -C packages/ui run format && pnpm -C packages/docs run format
